items.title: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks to Own for Decades and 1 That Underwhelm
items.description: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

items.title: 3 Warren Buffett Stocks to Buy Hand Over Fist in February
items.description: Even the Oracle of Omaha's picks can go "on sale" every now and then.
